title: V-
content:
{{Top|leg|title=v-}}
The '''v-''' was a unit of energy, used to characterize the amount of deliverable energy in a single [[tube charge]] for an artillery weapon. It was based on the energy required to excite a 400 cm by 8.5 cm rod of standard-purity [[vacierite]] to the point where a double-packed particle emission of 10<sup>24</sup> g2-ions in a coherent beam would be produced.

[[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]], the precursor to [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], originally developed the unit. It was later one of many units used by the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Service]] to rank and categorize artillery pieces.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
